scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail -n webapp,obras,agenda -c green,blue,yellow "npm run dev --workspace=webapp" "npm run dev --workspace=obras-client" "npm run dev --workspace=agenda-client"
scripts.dev:all: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail -n webapp,obras,agenda,inspec -c green,blue,yellow,magenta "npm run dev --workspace=webapp" "npm run dev --workspace=obras-client" "npm run dev --workspace=agenda-client" "npm run dev --workspace=inspeccion-client"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=obras-client && npm run build --workspace=agenda-client && npm run build --workspace=webapp && npm run build --workspace=inspeccion-client
